title: Change in salary or compensation not to discharge bonds
doc_html:
§195.  Change in salary or compensation not to discharge bonds

The principal and the sureties on official bonds shall not be released or discharged by reason of any change in salaries, fees, commissions or perquisites of office, during the time for which the bond has been given.
doc_text:
§195.  Change in salary or compensation not to discharge bonds
The principal and the sureties on official bonds shall not be released or discharged by reason of any change in salaries, fees, commissions or perquisites of office, during the time for which the bond has been given.
